name: Beard & Shave Balm
description: A non-shiny, non-oily, alcohol-free post-shave moisturizing balm that is easily absorbed to nourish and hydrate the skin following a close shave.
howToUse: Gently massage the balm into the skin on and around the shaved area until fully absorbed.
ingredients: Aqua, Hempseed Oil, Simmondsia Chinesis Polyethylene, Sodium Polyacrylate, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Parfum.
